title: salix × buseri
intro: Salix × buseri, also known as Buser's willow or hybrid willow, is a plant species that is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the Salix fragilis. The Salix × buseri plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties due to the presence of salicylic acid. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and alleviating inflammation, making it useful in treating various conditions such as headaches, arthritis, and other inflammatory diseases. The herbal preparations of Salix × buseri can be consumed as tea, taken as tincture, or applied topically as a salve to reap its medicinal benefits.
